title: Agent claims completion without external evidence
plain_language_summary: The agent signed its own completion claim, but no receiver, system of record, or settlement provider supports it.

reasons.explanation: Only a weak or self-claimed completion statement is available.

missing_evidence: Receiver, system-of-record, or independent settlement evidence.
One or more completeness elements required by the structural verifier.
limitations: This packet is generated from synthetic test evidence. No real payment occurred.
A valid signature proves integrity and provenance of a claim, not universal factual or legal truth.
The verdict is recalculable and may change when later evidence or a new ruleset is applied.
